name: mermail
description: Privacy-first email inboxes and workspace automation for AI agents through Mermail MCP.

interface.longDescription: Manage Mermail inboxes, email delivery, workspaces, task triage, and mailbox-agent workflows with scoped API-key authentication.
defaultPrompt: Summarize unread Mermail messages and suggest next actions.
Draft a reply in Mermail and wait for my approval before sending.
Review Mermail API credits and mailbox triage status.
